## Kotlin Mobile Application for learning Piano (without needing to learn to read sheet music)

I would like to create a mobile application for learning piano. This application will allow you to translate some form of encoded piano data (some form of JSON including the BPM, the tempo, then which piano note to play for each dt/time interval).

I want the application to be in Kotlin, but it is my first app in this language so I need it thoroughly commented. I would also require recommendations for how to run the application locally.

For beginning, please make the minimum required Kotlin code for running the app. Later on we will add more features and functionality.

Please make the app look modern and minimal. Eventually I will want to add a 'my library' interface where you can import new songs.

If you see the need for it, use the following tech stacks:

- Kotlin
- Jetpack Compose
- MVVM or MVI
- Hilt
- Room
- Coroutines + Flow
- MIDI/audio libraries as needed

Use context7 for fetching documentation.
